---
title : "Trust in {{Political Institutions}} and {{Support}} for {{Authoritarianism}}: {{Latin American Students}} -- {{Does Civic Knowledge Make}} a {{Difference}}?"
date : "2022-03-01"
author : "Miranda, Daniel; Castillo, Juan Carlos; Miranda, Catalina & Conejeros, Jose Daniel"
categories : ["Book Section"]
publication : "  In Ashley Weinberg: Psychology of {{Democracy}} 173--194 : Cambridge University Press [https://doi.org/10.1017/9781108774871.011](https://doi.org/10.1017/9781108774871.011). ISBN: 978-1-108-77487-1 978-1-108-47775-8 978-1-108-74509-3"
publication_short : "  In Ashley Weinberg: Psychology of {{Democracy}} 173--194 : Cambridge University Press [https://doi.org/10.1017/9781108774871.011](https://doi.org/10.1017/9781108774871.011). ISBN: 978-1-108-77487-1 978-1-108-47775-8 978-1-108-74509-3"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Miranda, Daniel; Castillo, Juan Carlos; Miranda, Catalina & Conejeros, Jose Daniel (2022). *Trust in {{Political Institutions}} and {{Support}} for {{Authoritarianism}}: {{Latin American Students}} -- {{Does Civic Knowledge Make}} a {{Difference}}?*.   In Ashley Weinberg: Psychology of {{Democracy}} 173--194 : Cambridge University Press [https://doi.org/10.1017/9781108774871.011](https://doi.org/10.1017/9781108774871.011). ISBN: 978-1-108-77487-1 978-1-108-47775-8 978-1-108-74509-3

:::
